understanding.goal_understanding: Guide the character across the tile grid to reach the goal gem (+) within the turn/attempt limits, avoiding hazards (spikes u/v) that cause an immediate loss.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Each turn you choose a horizontal action (MOVE_LEFT or MOVE_RIGHT), after which gravity (in this episode, DOWN) automatically pulls the character along the gravity direction until they land on a solid/support tile (o/m/w or other solid), hit a hazard (u/v), or reach the goal (+). CLICK interacts with clickable tiles such as breakable blocks (x); clicking a target position removes that tile without moving the player. UNDO reverses the previous action. Moves consume turns/steps, while clicks also consume turns/steps in the log shown; planning relies on predicting the final landing position after gravity resolves following each horizontal move.
